items.q: Name the compound with formula H2O.
Name the compound with formula HCl.
items.explanation: HCl is commonly called hydrochloric acid.

items.q: What type of bond usually forms between non-metals sharing electrons?
items.explanation: Shared electron pairs define covalent bonding.

items.q: Oxidation is the loss of electrons.
items.explanation: This is a standard mid-level chemistry concept.

items.q: What is the approximate molar mass of NaCl (g/mol)?
items.explanation: Add atomic masses multiplied by each atom count.

items.q: What type of bond usually forms between non-metals sharing electrons? (set 12)
items.explanation: Shared electron pairs define covalent bonding.

items.q: Reduction is the gain of electrons.
items.explanation: This is a standard mid-level chemistry concept.

items.q: What is the approximate molar mass of HCl (g/mol)?
items.explanation: Add atomic masses multiplied by each atom count.

items.q: What compound name matches the formula NaCl?
What is the approximate molar mass of O2 (g/mol)?
items.explanation: Add atomic masses multiplied by each atom count.
